title: Squirrel Removal in Cortlandt, NY | $900 - $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Cortlandt, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Cortlandt Manor & surrounding areas. Call today!
intro: Squirrels in your Cortlandt attic or walls can cause serious damage to insulation, wiring, and structural components. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Cortlandt, from lakefront properties near the Blue Mountain Reservation to residential neighborhoods in Cortlandt Manor. Our humane removal process includes trapping, exclusion, and preventative measures to keep your home squirrel-free.
whyUs: Our licensed technicians have extensive experience handling squirrel infestations in Cortlandt's diverse housing stock, from historic homes to modern developments. We use humane trapping methods, provide complete exclusion services, and offer warranties on our work to ensure long-term protection for your property.
localContext: Cortlandt's wooded areas near the Hudson River and numerous parks like Bear Mountain create ideal squirrel habitats that often lead to home invasions, especially during fall and winter months. Properties near Sprout Brook, Furnace Woods, and along Route 9 are particularly susceptible to squirrel activity as these animals seek warm shelter in attics and chimneys.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Cortlandt typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, entry point sealing, and sanitation services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Cortlandt home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning or evening hours, visible droppings, chewed wood or wires, entry holes near roof lines or soffits, and nesting materials. Cortlandt homeowners often notice increased activity during fall when squirrels gather food and seek winter shelter.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely captured and relocated according to local guidelines. We never use poisons or lethal traps, and we take special care during breeding season to ensure young squirrels are not separated from mothers.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Cortlandt property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Cortlandt service calls within 24 hours for inspections. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and entry points. After removal, we seal all entry points immediately to prevent re-entry and can complete attic restoration work if needed.
